member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Api.Dto.AuthResponse
member.summary: Root authentication response from the Xtream Codes player_api.php endpoint.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Api.Dto.AuthResponse.UserInfo
member.summary: Gets or sets the user information returned by the server.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Api.Dto.AuthResponse.ServerInfo
member.summary: Gets or sets the server information returned by the server.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Api.Dto.UserInfo
member.summary: Information about the authenticated Xtream Codes user account.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Api.Dto.UserInfo.Auth
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether authentication succeeded (1) or failed (0).

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Api.Dto.UserInfo.Status
member.summary: Gets or sets the account status (e.g. "Active", "Expired").

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Api.Dto.UserInfo.ExpDate
member.summary: Gets or sets the Unix timestamp (as a string) when the account expires.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Api.Dto.UserInfo.MaxConnections
member.summary: Gets or sets the maximum number of simultaneous connections allowed.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Api.Dto.UserInfo.ActiveCons
member.summary: Gets or sets the current number of active connections.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Api.Dto.UserInfo.AllowedOutputFormats
member.summary: Gets or sets the list of output formats allowed for this account.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Api.Dto.ServerInfo
member.summary: Information about the Xtream Codes server.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Api.Dto.ServerInfo.Url
member.summary: Gets or sets the server hostname or IP address.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Api.Dto.ServerInfo.Port
member.summary: Gets or sets the HTTP port the server listens on.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Api.Dto.ServerInfo.HttpsPort
member.summary: Gets or sets the HTTPS port the server listens on.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Api.Dto.ServerInfo.Protocol
member.summary: Gets or sets the preferred protocol ("http" or "https").

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Api.Dto.Category
member.summary: Represents a stream category (used for live, VOD, and series).

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Api.Dto.Category.CategoryId
member.summary: Gets or sets the unique category identifier.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Api.Dto.Category.CategoryName
member.summary: Gets or sets the human-readable category name.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Api.Dto.Category.ParentId
member.summary: Gets or sets the parent category ID (0 if top-level).

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Api.Dto.LiveStream
member.summary: Represents a live TV stream entry.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Api.Dto.LiveStream.StreamId
member.summary: Gets or sets the unique stream identifier.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Api.Dto.LiveStream.Name
member.summary: Gets or sets the display name of the channel.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Api.Dto.LiveStream.Num
member.summary: Gets or sets the ordering number for this stream.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Api.Dto.LiveStream.StreamIcon
member.summary: Gets or sets the URL to the channel logo/icon.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Api.Dto.LiveStream.EpgChannelId
member.summary: Gets or sets the EPG channel identifier used to match EPG data.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Api.Dto.LiveStream.CategoryId
member.summary: Gets or sets the category this stream belongs to.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Api.Dto.LiveStream.TvArchive
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether TV archive/catch-up is available (1) or not (0).

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Api.Dto.LiveStream.TvArchiveDuration
member.summary: Gets or sets the number of days of TV archive available.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Api.Dto.LiveStream.CustomSid
member.summary: Gets or sets the custom stream identifier, if any.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Api.Dto.VodStream
member.summary: Represents a Video-on-Demand stream entry.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Api.Dto.VodStream.StreamId
member.summary: Gets or sets the unique stream identifier.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Api.Dto.VodStream.Name
member.summary: Gets or sets the display name of the movie.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Api.Dto.VodStream.StreamIcon
member.summary: Gets or sets the URL to the movie poster/icon.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Api.Dto.VodStream.CategoryId
member.summary: Gets or sets the category this stream belongs to.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Api.Dto.VodStream.ContainerExtension
member.summary: Gets or sets the file container extension (e.g. "mp4", "mkv").

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Api.Dto.VodStream.Rating
member.summary: Gets or sets the rating string for this movie.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Api.Dto.VodStream.Added
member.summary: Gets or sets the Unix timestamp (as a string) when the stream was added.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Api.Dto.VodInfo
member.summary: Full VOD info response including metadata and stream data.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Api.Dto.VodInfo.Info
member.summary: Gets or sets the detailed metadata for this movie.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Api.Dto.VodInfo.MovieData
member.summary: Gets or sets the stream data for this movie.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Api.Dto.VodInfoDetail
member.summary: Detailed metadata for a VOD movie.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Api.Dto.VodInfoDetail.TmdbId
member.summary: Gets or sets the TMDB identifier for this movie.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Api.Dto.VodInfoDetail.ImdbId
member.summary: Gets or sets the IMDb identifier for this movie.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Api.Dto.VodInfoDetail.Plot
member.summary: Gets or sets the plot synopsis.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Api.Dto.VodInfoDetail.Cast
member.summary: Gets or sets a comma-separated list of cast members.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Api.Dto.VodInfoDetail.Director
member.summary: Gets or sets the director(s) of the movie.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Api.Dto.VodInfoDetail.Genre
member.summary: Gets or sets the genre(s) of the movie.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Api.Dto.VodInfoDetail.ReleaseDate
member.summary: Gets or sets the release date string.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Api.Dto.VodInfoDetail.Rating
member.summary: Gets or sets the rating string.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Api.Dto.VodInfoDetail.DurationSecs
member.summary: Gets or sets the duration in seconds.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Api.Dto.VodInfoDetail.MovieImage
member.summary: Gets or sets the URL to the movie poster image.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Api.Dto.VodInfoDetail.BackdropPath
member.summary: Gets or sets a list of backdrop image URLs.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Api.Dto.VodInfoDetail.YoutubeTrailer
member.summary: Gets or sets the YouTube trailer video ID or URL.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Api.Dto.VodInfoDetail.EpisodeRunTime
member.summary: Gets or sets the episode runtime string (used for series, may appear in some VOD responses).

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Api.Dto.SeriesStream
member.summary: Represents a series (TV show) entry in the Xtream Codes catalog.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Api.Dto.SeriesStream.SeriesId
member.summary: Gets or sets the unique series identifier.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Api.Dto.SeriesStream.Name
member.summary: Gets or sets the display name of the series.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Api.Dto.SeriesStream.Cover
member.summary: Gets or sets the URL to the series cover art.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Api.Dto.SeriesStream.CategoryId
member.summary: Gets or sets the category this series belongs to.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Api.Dto.SeriesStream.Genre
member.summary: Gets or sets the genre(s) of the series.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Api.Dto.SeriesStream.ReleaseDate
member.summary: Gets or sets the release date string.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Api.Dto.SeriesStream.Plot
member.summary: Gets or sets the plot synopsis.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Api.Dto.SeriesStream.RatingBased
member.summary: Gets or sets the rating on a 5-point scale.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Api.Dto.SeriesInfo
member.summary: Full series info response including metadata, seasons, and episodes.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Api.Dto.SeriesInfo.Info
member.summary: Gets or sets the detailed metadata for this series.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Api.Dto.SeriesInfo.Seasons
member.summary: Gets or sets the seasons dictionary keyed by season number string.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Api.Dto.SeriesInfo.Episodes
member.summary: Gets or sets the episodes dictionary keyed by season number string.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Api.Dto.SeriesInfoDetail
member.summary: Detailed metadata for a series.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Api.Dto.SeriesInfoDetail.TmdbId
member.summary: Gets or sets the TMDB identifier (may be a numeric string).

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Api.Dto.SeriesInfoDetail.ImdbId
member.summary: Gets or sets the IMDb identifier.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Api.Dto.SeriesInfoDetail.TvdbId
member.summary: Gets or sets the TVDB identifier.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Api.Dto.SeriesInfoDetail.Name
member.summary: Gets or sets the series name.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Api.Dto.SeriesInfoDetail.Cover
member.summary: Gets or sets the URL to the series cover art.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Api.Dto.SeriesInfoDetail.Plot
member.summary: Gets or sets the plot synopsis.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Api.Dto.SeriesInfoDetail.Genre
member.summary: Gets or sets the genre(s) of the series.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Api.Dto.SeriesInfoDetail.ReleaseDate
member.summary: Gets or sets the release date string.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Api.Dto.SeriesInfoDetail.EpisodeRunTime
member.summary: Gets or sets the episode runtime string.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Api.Dto.SeriesInfoDetail.BackdropPath
member.summary: Gets or sets a list of backdrop image URLs.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Api.Dto.SeasonInfo
member.summary: Metadata for a single season of a series.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Api.Dto.SeasonInfo.SeasonNumber
member.summary: Gets or sets the season number.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Api.Dto.SeasonInfo.Name
member.summary: Gets or sets the season name.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Api.Dto.SeasonInfo.Overview
member.summary: Gets or sets the season overview/synopsis.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Api.Dto.SeasonInfo.Cover
member.summary: Gets or sets the URL to the season cover image.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Api.Dto.SeasonInfo.CoverBig
member.summary: Gets or sets the URL to the large season cover image.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Api.Dto.EpisodeInfo
member.summary: Represents a single episode within a series season.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Api.Dto.EpisodeInfo.Id
member.summary: Gets or sets the unique episode identifier (stream ID as a string).

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Api.Dto.EpisodeInfo.EpisodeNum
member.summary: Gets or sets the episode number within the season.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Api.Dto.EpisodeInfo.Title
member.summary: Gets or sets the episode title.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Api.Dto.EpisodeInfo.ContainerExtension
member.summary: Gets or sets the file container extension (e.g. "mp4", "mkv").

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Api.Dto.EpisodeInfo.Info
member.summary: Gets or sets the detailed metadata for this episode.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Api.Dto.EpisodeInfoDetail
member.summary: Detailed metadata for an episode.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Api.Dto.EpisodeInfoDetail.Plot
member.summary: Gets or sets the episode plot description.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Api.Dto.EpisodeInfoDetail.ReleaseDate
member.summary: Gets or sets the episode air date string.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Api.Dto.EpisodeInfoDetail.DurationSecs
member.summary: Gets or sets the episode duration in seconds.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Api.Dto.EpisodeInfoDetail.StillImage
member.summary: Gets or sets the URL to the episode still/thumbnail image.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Api.Dto.ShortEpgResponse
member.summary: Response from the short EPG endpoint containing current and upcoming programme listings.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Api.Dto.ShortEpgResponse.EpgListings
member.summary: Gets or sets the list of EPG entries.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Api.Dto.ShortEpgEntry
member.summary: A single EPG programme entry.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Api.Dto.ShortEpgEntry.Id
member.summary: Gets or sets the entry identifier.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Api.Dto.ShortEpgEntry.EpgId
member.summary: Gets or sets the EPG channel identifier.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Api.Dto.ShortEpgEntry.Title
member.summary: Gets or sets the programme title (may be Base64-encoded depending on provider).

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Api.Dto.ShortEpgEntry.Start
member.summary: Gets or sets the programme start time string.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Api.Dto.ShortEpgEntry.End
member.summary: Gets or sets the programme end time string.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Api.Dto.ShortEpgEntry.Description
member.summary: Gets or sets the programme description (may be Base64-encoded depending on provider).

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Api.XtreamApiClient
member.summary: HTTP client for communicating with an Xtream Codes IPTV panel API.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Api.XtreamApiClient.#ctor(System.Net.Http.HttpClient,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Api.XtreamApiClient})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Api.XtreamApiClient.AuthenticateAsync(Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Configuration.ProviderConfig,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Authenticates against the Xtream Codes API and retrieves server/user info.
member.param: The provider configuration to authenticate with.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Api.XtreamApiClient.GetLiveCategoriesAsync(Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Configuration.ProviderConfig,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Retrieves all live stream categories for the given provider.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Api.XtreamApiClient.GetLiveStreamsAsync(Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Configuration.ProviderConfig,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Retrieves all live streams for the given provider.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Api.XtreamApiClient.GetVodCategoriesAsync(Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Configuration.ProviderConfig,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Retrieves all VOD categories for the given provider.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Api.XtreamApiClient.GetVodStreamsAsync(Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Configuration.ProviderConfig,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Retrieves all VOD streams for the given provider.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Api.XtreamApiClient.GetVodInfoAsync(Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Configuration.ProviderConfig,System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Retrieves detailed info for a specific VOD stream.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Api.XtreamApiClient.GetSeriesCategoriesAsync(Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Configuration.ProviderConfig,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Retrieves all series categories for the given provider.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Api.XtreamApiClient.GetSeriesAsync(Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Configuration.ProviderConfig,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Retrieves all series entries for the given provider.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Api.XtreamApiClient.GetSeriesInfoAsync(Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Configuration.ProviderConfig,System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Retrieves detailed info (seasons and episodes) for a specific series.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Api.XtreamApiClient.GetShortEpgAsync(Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Configuration.ProviderConfig,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Retrieves the short EPG listing for a specific live stream.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Api.XtreamApiClient.BuildLiveStreamUrl(Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Configuration.ProviderConfig,System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Builds the stream URL for a live channel.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Api.XtreamApiClient.BuildVodStreamUrl(Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Configuration.ProviderConfig,System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Builds the stream URL for a VOD movie.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Api.XtreamApiClient.BuildSeriesStreamUrl(Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Configuration.ProviderConfig,System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Builds the stream URL for a series episode.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Api.XtreamApiClient.DecryptPassword(System.String)
member.summary: Decrypts a stored password. Currently a no-op placeholder — replace with a real implementation (e.g. DPAPI or AES) before production use.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Configuration.PluginConfiguration
member.summary: Plugin configuration for Flux.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.Providers
member.summary: Gets or sets the list of configured IPTV providers.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.LiveChannelRefreshHours
member.summary: Gets or sets how often (in hours) live channel data is refreshed.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.EpgRefreshHours
member.summary: Gets or sets how often (in hours) EPG data is refreshed.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.VodRefreshHours
member.summary: Gets or sets how often (in hours) VOD data is refreshed.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.SeriesRefreshHours
member.summary: Gets or sets how often (in hours) series data is refreshed.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Configuration.ProviderHealth
member.summary: Represents the health status of an Xtream Codes provider.

member.name: F:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Configuration.ProviderHealth.Unknown
member.summary: Health status is not yet known.

member.name: F:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Configuration.ProviderHealth.Ok
member.summary: Provider is reachable and functioning normally.

member.name: F:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Configuration.ProviderHealth.Degraded
member.summary: Provider is reachable but experiencing issues.

member.name: F:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Configuration.ProviderHealth.Failed
member.summary: Provider is unreachable or returning errors.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Configuration.ProviderConfig
member.summary: Configuration for a single Xtream Codes IPTV provider.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Configuration.ProviderConfig.Id
member.summary: Gets or sets the unique identifier for this provider.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Configuration.ProviderConfig.DisplayName
member.summary: Gets or sets the human-readable display name for this provider.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Configuration.ProviderConfig.BaseUrl
member.summary: Gets or sets the base URL of the Xtream Codes server (e.g. http://provider.example.com:8080).

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Configuration.ProviderConfig.Username
member.summary: Gets or sets the Xtream Codes username.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Configuration.ProviderConfig.EncryptedPassword
member.summary: Gets or sets the encrypted Xtream Codes password.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Configuration.ProviderConfig.UserAgent
member.summary: Gets or sets the user-agent string sent with HTTP requests to this provider.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Configuration.ProviderConfig.RequireHttps
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether HTTPS is required for this provider.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Configuration.ProviderConfig.EnabledCategoryIds
member.summary: Gets or sets the list of category IDs that are enabled for this provider. An empty list means all categories are enabled.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Configuration.ProviderConfig.LastSyncAt
member.summary: Gets or sets the timestamp of the last successful sync for this provider.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Configuration.ProviderConfig.Health
member.summary: Gets or sets the current health status of this provider.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Configuration.ProviderConfig.LastError
member.summary: Gets or sets the last error message encountered when communicating with this provider.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Plugin
member.summary: Main plugin class for Flux - Xtream Codes IPTV client.

member.name: F:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Plugin.PluginGuid
member.summary: The unique identifier for this plugin.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Plugin.Instance
member.summary: Gets the singleton instance of this plugin.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Plugin.#ctor(MediaBrowser.Common.Configuration.IApplicationPaths,MediaBrowser.Model.Serialization.IXmlSerializer)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.ServiceCollectionExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods for registering Flux plugin services with the DI container.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.ServiceCollectionExtensions.AddFluxPlugin(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection)
member.summary: Registers all Flux plugin services into the provided .

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Services.CatalogCache
member.summary: In-memory cache for Xtream Codes catalog data (live streams, VOD, series, categories). Keyed by provider ID to support multiple providers simultaneously.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Services.CatalogCache.GetOrCreate(System.Guid)
member.summary: Gets or creates the catalog for the specified provider.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Services.CatalogCache.Invalidate(System.Guid)
member.summary: Removes all cached data for the specified provider.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Services.CatalogCache.InvalidateAll
member.summary: Removes all cached data for all providers.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Services.ProviderCatalog
member.summary: Holds cached catalog data for a single provider.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Services.ProviderCatalog.LiveCategories
member.summary: Gets or sets the cached list of live stream categories.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Services.ProviderCatalog.LiveStreams
member.summary: Gets or sets the cached list of live streams.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Services.ProviderCatalog.LiveStreamsRefreshedAt
member.summary: Gets or sets the time the live stream data was last refreshed.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Services.ProviderCatalog.VodCategories
member.summary: Gets or sets the cached list of VOD categories.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Services.ProviderCatalog.VodStreams
member.summary: Gets or sets the cached list of VOD streams.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Services.ProviderCatalog.VodRefreshedAt
member.summary: Gets or sets the time the VOD data was last refreshed.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Services.ProviderCatalog.SeriesCategories
member.summary: Gets or sets the cached list of series categories.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Services.ProviderCatalog.Series
member.summary: Gets or sets the cached list of series.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Services.ProviderCatalog.SeriesRefreshedAt
member.summary: Gets or sets the time the series data was last refreshed.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Services.CatalogSyncService
member.summary: Orchestrates periodic catalog sync operations for all configured providers, pulling live streams, VOD, series, and EPG data from Xtream Codes servers.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Services.CatalogSyncService.#ctor(Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Api.XtreamApiClient,Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Services.CatalogCache,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Services.CatalogSyncService})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Services.CatalogSyncService.SyncProviderAsync(Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Configuration.ProviderConfig,Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Configuration.PluginConfiguration,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Performs a full sync for a single provider, refreshing all catalog data that has exceeded its configured TTL.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Services.CatalogSyncService.SyncAllProvidersAsync(Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Configuration.PluginConfiguration,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Performs a full sync for all configured providers.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Services.XmltvParser
member.summary: Parses XMLTV-format EPG data from a URL or stream.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Services.XmltvParser.#ctor(System.Net.Http.IHttpClientFactory,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Services.XmltvParser})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: Factory used to create HTTP clients.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Services.XmltvParser.ParseFromUrlAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Downloads and parses an XMLTV EPG file from the given URL.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Services.XmltvParser.ParseFromStreamAsync(System.IO.Stream,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Parses XMLTV EPG data from the given stream.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Services.XmltvProgramme
member.summary: Represents a single programme entry from an XMLTV EPG file.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Services.XmltvProgramme.ChannelId
member.summary: Gets or sets the channel identifier this programme belongs to.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Services.XmltvProgramme.Start
member.summary: Gets or sets the programme start time.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Services.XmltvProgramme.Stop
member.summary: Gets or sets the programme end time (may be null if not provided).

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Services.XmltvProgramme.Title
member.summary: Gets or sets the programme title.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Services.XmltvProgramme.Description
member.summary: Gets or sets the programme description.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Services.XmltvProgramme.Category
member.summary: Gets or sets the programme category.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Flux.Services.XmltvProgramme.IconUrl
member.summary: Gets or sets the URL to a programme icon/poster.
